text.title: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Evaluation — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `fine-tuning-openai-eval`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: prepare-eval
step.input: ft + base model IDs + held-out path.

step.name: judge
step.action: LLM-as-judge per example; record score + reasoning.

step.name: gate-decision
step.action: Compute pass/fail per metric; overall = all-pass; record CI.
